ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., customer satisfaction, market research) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was created */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Status of the survey (active, archived) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the survey was modified */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the survey is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple choice, rating scale) */,
  "scale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response scale for the question */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the question is required */,
  "sequence_number" INTEGER /* Order of the question within the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_scale_id FOREIGN KEY ("scale_id") REFERENCES scales ("scale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response is for */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent who provided the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was submitted */,
  "raw_response" REAL /* Raw response value (e.g., rating scale value) */,
  "scaled_value" REAL /* Scaled response value */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the response is valid */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments provided by the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the respondent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the respondent is from */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the respondent belongs to */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the respondent is associated with */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the respondent */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the respondent */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scales" (
  "scale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scale */,
  "scale_name" TEXT /* Name of the scale */,
  "scale_type" TEXT /* Type of scale (e.g., rating scale, Likert scale) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the scale */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the scale */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the scale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the client is from */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the client belongs to */,
  "contact_person_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_person_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_person_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "annual_revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst (e.g., data analyst, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the analyst belongs to */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the analyst has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis request */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who made the request */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst assigned to the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "request_description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of completion */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the request (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_requests_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_requests_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis request the result is for */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the result was generated */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis result */,
  "confidentiality_level" TEXT /* Level of confidentiality of the results */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the results */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who reviewed the results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES analysis_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the version is for */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "analysis_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis result the version is for */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the survey data or analysis result */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_analysis_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_result_id") REFERENCES analysis_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "raw_response_values" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response the raw value is for */,
  "raw_value" REAL /* Raw response value */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the raw response is valid */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments related to the raw response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scaled_response_values" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response the scaled value is for */,
  "scaled_value" REAL /* Scaled response value */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the scaled response is valid */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments related to the scaled response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id")
)
